reviews.text: Frances is an absolutely amazing photographer and person. She is so talented and all our pictures turned out amazing. She really listened to our style and what we wanted but it turned out even better than we could have hoped. She makes you feel so comfortable behind the camera and coaches you while still being yourself and highlighting you (or the couple) as individuals. Would 10000% recommend and will be using her again.

Frances is incredible. If you are considering hiring her for your wedding, engagement shoot, family photos, whatever.. do it! My husband and I are both very awkward and camera-shy and Frances helped us feel comfortable and somehow captured some absolutely fabulous shots of us! She is professional & responsive while also being laid-back and easy to work with. 10/10

There really aren't enough words to say how amazing our experience with Frances was. She photographed our wedding at Copper Mountain and we could not be happier with the moments she captured. My wife and I were a little nervous to be the center of attention all day, but Frances and her team made us feel SO unbelievably comfortable which allowed her to capture us as we are (not posed and very natural).  By the end of the day we felt like she was more of a friend than a vendor and that was extremely important to us. We live in Boston and had absolutely no issue communicating with her from 2000+ miles away. We could not have selected a better photographer for our big day and would recommend her to literally anyone. We hope we have the opportunity to work with her again in the future. Thank you SO much Frances, we are forever grateful!

Frances was able to turn my rainy wedding day in ATX into a perfect backdrop for photos that are out of this world. Words cannot describe the joy and love I felt seeing the story of our day unfold through our photo gallery. Thank you, Frances and team!

Frances and Tony were absolutely amazing from the first meeting to the BIG day! They captured one of the most important days of our lives and made the whole process seamless, even for a 20° winter day. We are forever grateful for you capturing such a special day. Thank you!
